data.title: Cryptocurrency Monero Decreases More Than 4% Within 24 hours
data.description: Monero's (CRYPTO: XMR) price has decreased 4.14% over the past 24 hours to $155.17, continuing its downward trend over the past week of -0.0%, moving from $155.95 to its current price.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Ethereum Classic Falls More Than 3% In 24 hours
data.description: Over the past 24 hours, Ethereum Classic's (CRYPTO: ETC) price has fallen 3.16% to $19.53. This is opposite to its positive trend over the past week where it has experienced a 1.0% gain, moving from $19.26 to its current price.
